meaning: n.公羊,撞锤;vi.猛击,撞;vt.猛击,填塞,灌输;n. Random access memory,随机访问存储器
examples: The system has 256 MB RAM, expandable to 2GB.
It's got 256 megabytes of ROM and 512 megabytes of RAM.
Once you modify this file, upload it via RAM.
Other hardware mentions include 1GB of RAM, 8-megapixel camera, 16GB of storage plus microSD capability.
Chrysler Group said Ram pickup sales jumped 22 percent from last May to almost 32, 000.
